title: MeetingSummary
description: Structured, faithful summary of a single meeting transcript.

date.description: ISO 8601 date if explicitly stated in the transcript, else null.

participants.description: Speaker names present in the transcript.

points.description: Short, paraphrased factual statements. No quotes or full paragraphs.

attribution.description: Person whose view this topic primarily reflects, if one person owns it; else null.

decisions.description: Things actually agreed, settled, or chosen. Conditional decisions keep their condition in the string.

owner.description: Named/clearly-implied owner, else null. Never guessed.

due.description: Stated deadline or trigger, else null.

key_terms.description: Salient terms worth looking up — named entities, technologies, methods, organisations actually mentioned.

term.description: Canonical name of the term (e.g. 'Kubernetes', not 'k8s').

description.description: One-line gloss from the discussion, if helpful; else null.

wikipedia.description: Resolved Wikipedia article URL. Filled automatically — leave null.

wikidata.description: Resolved Wikidata entity URI. Filled automatically — leave null.
